pages.raw_text:
Tomorrow service will begin on
the new city lines of the Washing
ton Water Power in Lidgerwood.
The new lines are the one on Divi-
sion street from Liberty avenue to
Rowan avenue and on Addison
street from Liberty to Rowan. The
new line on Addison street will
take care of the cars that hereto
fore run on the Lidgerwood line,
and will continue to be known as
the Lidgerwood line.


The Inauguration of the new
service will give Lidgerwood and
Kenwood three car lines running
north and south almost to the north
city limits, the Division, Lidger
wood and Astor lines. All three
lines will run to Rowan avenue,
limits of the city. Division street
under the new schedule will have
three car lines to Boone avenue
and two lines to Liberty avenue.
The Lidgerwood and Division lines
will run over Pacific avenue on the
south end of their runs, and the
Astor line will run over the Max
well line.


Following are the schedules an
nounced.


AsToR LINE.


Fifteen minute service-Leave
Rowan and Nevada four minutes
after the hour, beginning at 5:49
and every Is minutes thereafter
Last car at 1890 a. NJ.

8, IS, 33 and As minutes past the
hour.

the Aston line, Princeton and Ne
vada, downtown, from 6:20 to $40
a. m. Trippers in the evening from

from AIS to 5:33.
